name: io.github.Tyox-all/mund
description: MCP security scanner: prompt injection, secrets, PII, MCP server scanning

tools.name: mund_scan
tools.description: Scan content for security issues (injection, secrets, PII, code patterns)

tools.name: mund_scan_conversation
tools.description: Scan an entire conversation history for security issues

tools.name: mund_check_secret
tools.description: Check if a specific string looks like a secret/credential

tools.name: mund_check_pii
tools.description: Check content for personally identifiable information

tools.name: mund_get_stats
tools.description: Get scanning statistics and detection history

tools.name: mund_scan_mcp_server
tools.description: Scan MCP server manifests for security issues before installation

tools.name: mund_check_typosquatting
tools.description: Check if server name is typosquatting a legitimate server

tools.name: mund_audit_mcp_permissions
tools.description: Audit permission scope and capabilities of MCP server tools
